meaning: n.科多帕希火山(在厄瓜多尔北部)
examples: Mt Cotopaxi is the highest active volcano in Ecuador and one of the highest in the world.
Cotopaxi, with its white cone brilliant against the blue sky, he found the most beautiful of all.
Outfitters in Quito, about 75km south of Cotopaxi, offer all manner of Cotopaxi climbs, often combined with mountain biking, horse riding and hiking or camping in the park.
